# Local-only workflows — protected during upstream sync.
# Files listed here will never be overwritten by upstream merges.
# One path per line, relative to repo root.
# Comments (#) and blank lines are ignored.
.github/workflows/sign-and-publish.yml
.github/workflows/sync-upstream.yml
.github/workflows/backfill-release.yml
.github/workflows/release-gap-fill.yml
